{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = miners
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Miners]] go inside the [[Transcendent Ruins]] to draw scales from the air.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
